headline: The Bull Case For Bank of New York Mellon (BK) Could Change Following Supportive Wall Street Commentary On Its Rate-Sensitive Model
summary: In recent commentary, billionaire investor Mario Gabelli and several Wall Street analysts highlighted Bank of New York Mellon Corporation’s exposure to a steeper interest rate curve, revived deal-making, strong equity markets, and robust spending among affluent clients as supportive factors for its global investment services and management franchise. This wave of supportive opinions underscores how BNY’s capital-light model and long-term client relationships are seen as differentiators in an...
